{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182854089D5356446311A24620"}"},"total":1859},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7589727624965751577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"至少在舆论这个剧情还有买丝的剧情，让我学到的东西能用在工作上，这本书就值一个超五星了
理，法，情，利，俗
非零和博弈
以前也在别的地方看到过类似的名词说辞，但是都很晦涩，都没有在这本小说里看的这么简单易懂又有趣
最主要是真的能用在我和一些客户的谈判上，真的有用有趣之书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767128427,"group_id":"7570364640530533400","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2013912997563800"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570364640530533400","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"145"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6185,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29328,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7589710768781361945","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书啊好书啊！！！能学到东西又有趣的书啊！！！番茄罕见的书，我第一次在番茄看到这样喔书，我从来没给过哪本书五颗星，这是第一本
PS：越往后看越能感受到作者文笔的长进
剧情和文章内容是一直没得挑，非常好非常牛逼
仙草啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767128128,"group_id":"7570364640530533400","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"朝闻道，夕死可矣……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4AhPu+rDffXk77mTraJoE2HzSPLg1UOftduluxYLM7J","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8a59990c7fc34225a33e5e1bd645c9a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795737&x-signature=oRuiaC2nKFmavfSyiQjl56ln1mo%3D","user_id":"2013912997563800","user_name":"唐大助"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2013912997563800","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570364640530533400","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举】+【师徒群像】+【权谋博弈】
金牌公考讲师陈文，穿越大夏当老师。
开局一座破书院，三个问题学生，陈文表示：问题不大，业务很熟。
用逻辑学解构八股，用申论思维写策论，用面试技巧过殿试。
从县试案首到状元及第，他的学生一路霸榜，把传统大儒考到怀疑人生！
谁说书生只是纸上谈兵？
宁阳税改，他带学生算死奸商，
江宁商战，他教弟子做空权贵，
京城风云，他和学生硬撼相权！
当朝首辅：“我斗了一辈子，没输给政敌，却输给了一群考秀才的学生？”
内廷权宦：“咱家的钱袋子，怎么全进了陈文的腰包？”
当他的学生们一个个身穿朱紫，把持六部，肃清朝纲时，
人们终于惊恐地发现，那个坐在幕后，从未踏入官场半步的教书先生，早已成为了左右大夏命运的——无冕帝师
皇帝：“先生，朕这江山，您看怎么改？”
陈文放下戒尺：“陛下，先让学生们把这道治国的题做完。”　","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f4e7edffd0a95c37be5f859b2bdbfa34","author":"闻香识女","author_id":"","book_id":"7570364640530533400","book_name":"公考讲师教科举，教出满朝文武","book_short_name":"夫子治世","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b07868","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"24.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7570364754774999576","read_count":"242243","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"850082"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"325","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,科举,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/703b009f44fca1c0af9e39ee05484bd6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445734&x-signature=wrH8R1vu1nTpm0sv1duPi9LUUQc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4072207968380455","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"145"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182854089D5356446311A24620"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":42,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6185,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29328,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":27061},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1767162295,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601917305513771801","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看的没边了 没有什么后宫没有什么恩怨 就是爽 有逻辑的爽 有道理的爽 有内容的爽 看下来真的是节奏紧凑 情节起伏恰到好处 不会爽点太多让人麻木 也不会空白太多让人难受 真的对我个人来说可以是接近完美的作品了 关键是它不仅在讲故事 它还在潜移默化的把一些知识也传到了我的脑子里 逻辑思维 世界观 还有很多视角思维 都很好很正 不只是爽文 不只是小说 更是把知识以一种更加有意思的方式表现了出来 大大同时也用真正的现实中的理论和知识去让小说更加的真实生动和立体 真的 看下来是真的爽 看完不觉得脑子空空 很满足 很满足 唉 唯一缺点就是 我刷到的时候咋没完结！！！！！！！（作者你更快点[哭]）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769959929,"group_id":"7570364640530533400","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嗯……！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8lXwNm448WtV5PyGS2fASbbDGkfJyL6BStbvn3cuN09","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9498f9f992ef4a348b00bae683c43d01~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788266&x-signature=8acyKRqN6nwV2uk6vFQ529uV%2BR8%3D","user_id":"2652450488583454","user_name":"KKCUF"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2652450488583454","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570364640530533400","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举】+【师徒群像】+【权谋博弈】
